title: sophora tomentosa subsp. littoralis
intro: Sophora tomentosa subsp. littoralis, also known as the coastal sophora, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sophora tomentosa subsp. littoralis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and acting as an immune system booster. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, capsules, and ointments, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
